name: Pear-Walnut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Drain and chop pears.
3. Combine bread mix, nectar, and egg in a large bowl until well blended.
4. Stir in chopped pears and nuts. Turn batter into greased and floured 8 1/2 x 4 1/2-inch loaf pan.
5. Bake for 45 to 55 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool bread for 10 minutes in the pan on a wire rack. Remove from pan and cool completely on rack.
